ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vcf_fields" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the field */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the field */,
  "entity" TEXT /* Entity type for the field */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the field (e.g., string, long) */,
  "ref_entity" TEXT /* Reference entity if applicable */,
  "id_attribute" INTEGER /* Attribute for unique identification */,
  "nillable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the field can be null */,
  "enum_options" TEXT /* Enumeration options for the field */,
  "range_min" REAL /* Minimum range for numeric fields */,
  "range_max" REAL /* Maximum range for numeric fields */,
  "lookup_attribute" TEXT /* Attribute used for lookup operations */,
  "label_attribute" TEXT /* Label for the field */,
  "read_only" INTEGER /* Indicates if the field is read-only */,
  "aggregateable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the field is aggregateable */,
  "visible" INTEGER /* Indicates if the field is visible */,
  "unique" INTEGER /* Indicates if the field's value must be unique */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the field */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the field was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the field */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the field */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the field */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the field is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vcf_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the VCF file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the uploaded VCF file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was uploaded */,
  "size" REAL /* Size of the VCF file in MB */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the VCF file */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* The format of the VCF file (e.g., VCFv4.3) */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the file is publicly accessible */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Indicates if the file is archived */,
  "md5_checksum" TEXT /* MD5 checksum of the file for integrity verification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the file was uploaded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the file */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_records" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the variant record */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the VCF file it belongs to */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome where the variant is located */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the variant on the chromosome */,
  "id" TEXT /* Identifier for the variant */,
  "ref" TEXT /* Reference allele */,
  "alt" TEXT /* Alternate allele(s) */,
  "quality" REAL /* Quality score of the variant */,
  "filter" TEXT /* Filter status of the variant (e.g., PASS, FAIL) */,
  "info" TEXT /* Additional information about the variant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the variant record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the variant record */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the variant record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the variant record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_records_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES vcf_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions granted to this role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the VCF file accessed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the accessing client */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vcf_validation_logs" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation log entry */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the VCF file that was validated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of validation (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if validation failed */,
  "validation_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the validation was performed */,
  "validated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the validation */,
  "is_automatic" INTEGER /* Indicates if the validation was performed automatically */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vcf_validation_logs_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES vcf_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the annotation */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the variant record being annotated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the annotation (e.g., dbSNP, ClinVar) */,
  "annotation" TEXT /* Annotation type (e.g., clinical significance) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the annotation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the annotation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the annotation */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the annotation */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the annotation */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the annotation (e.g., 0.95) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_annotations_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variant_records ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vcf_versioning" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the version entry */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the VCF file */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the file */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of this version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "released_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who released this version */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the current version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vcf_versioning_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES vcf_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sharing" (
  "sharing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the sharing entry */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the VCF file being shared */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* Users or groups the file is shared with */,
  "sharing_date" TEXT /* Date of sharing */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted for the shared file */,
  "sharing_type" TEXT /* Type of sharing (e.g., user, group, public) */,
  "is_revoked" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sharing has been revoked */,
  "revoked_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who revoked the sharing */,
  "revoked_date" TEXT /* Date when the sharing was revoked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sharing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES vcf_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the changes */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table affected */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the affected record */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the affected record */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the affected record */,
  "is_automated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the change was automated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
